case_title: BAYLIN, DOROTHY et al vs. CHASE, KYLE LYNNE et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAYLIN, DOROTHY BAYLIN, BERTRAND AS TO DEFENDANT CHASE, KYLE LYNNE QUINTEROS, J. KYLE QUINTEROS, DAGO DOES I-X SUMMONS ISSUED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAYLIN, DOROTHY BAYLIN, BERTRAND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHASE, KYLE LYNNE QUINTEROS, DAGO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 550 LARKIN STREET, APARTMENT #501, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA $742.50 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $742.50, LEASE FORFEITED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
EXECUTION FOR MONEY, POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CHASE, KYLE LYNNE QUINTEROS, DAGO
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAYLIN, DOROTHY BAYLIN, BERTRAND CHASE, KYLE LYNNE QUINTEROS, DAGO
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $18.33 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAYLIN, DOROTHY BAYLIN, BERTRAND
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY, POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT CHASE, KYLE LYNNE QUINTEROS, DAGO
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT QUINTEROS, J. KYLE
